zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Croyser於1350年出生在英國素瑞時，她的父親William Croyser11347歲，母親Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon13歲。她於大約1375年與Ralph Camoys在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格雷哈爾結婚。她去世於1420年12月15日在英國賀福爾可勒格享年70歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾可勒格哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Croyser于1350年出生在英国素瑞时，她的父亲William Croyser11347岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon13岁。她于大约1375年与Ralph Camoys在英国英格兰諾福爾可格雷哈爾结婚。她去世于1420年12月15日在英国賀福爾可勒格享年70岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾可勒格哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Croyser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Krauser  .

variants.name: Krauser
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone with curly hair, from an inflected form of Middle High German krūs ‘curly, crinkly’, German kraus.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Croyser was born in 1350, in Surrey, England, her father, William Croyser, was 11347 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon, was 13. She married Ralph Camoys about 1375, in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She died on 15 December 1420, in Clehonger, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Croyser est née en 1350, à Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William Croyser, avait 11347 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Camoys environ 1375, à Gressenhall, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 15 décembre 1420, à Clehonger, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Croyser 1350 in Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Croyser 11347 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon 13. Sie hat um 1375 in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Ralph Camoys geheiratet. Sie starb am 15. Dezember 1420 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Clehonger, Herefordshire, England und wurde in All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Croyser è nata il nel 1350 nel Surrey, England, sua padre, William Croyser, aveva 11347 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Camoys circa 1375, nel Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 15 dicembre 1420, nel Clehonger, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Croyserが1350年にイギリススリーで生まれた時，父William Croyserは11347歳，母Lady Elizabeth d'Abernonは13歳であった。約1375年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレセンハルでRalph Camoysと結婚した。彼女は1420年12月15日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクレhオンジャーで70歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクレhオンジャーアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Church Clehonger, Herefordshi: 영국 허퍼드실르 클레호그거 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Croyser(이)가 1350년 영국 수리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Croyser(은)는 11347세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그레센홀에서 Ralph Camoys(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1420년 12월 15일 영국 허퍼드실르 클레호그거에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 클레호그거 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Croyser nasceu em 1350, em Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Croyser, tinha 11347 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Camoys aproximadamente 1375, em Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1420, em Clehonger, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints Church Clehonger, Herefordshi: алл сеинц' чурч, клэонгир, хирефордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Croyser родилась в 1350 г. в местности сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени William Croyser было 11347 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth d'Abernon, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Camoys около 1375 г. в местности грессенолл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 15 декабря 1420 г. в местности клэонгир, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц' чурч, клэонгир, хирефордшир, Англия.
